content: {"summary": "Created a filtered view of 73 planets with complete radius and mass data. This subset is enriched in Transit detections (65%) and covers radii from 0.85 to 15 Earth radii and masses from 0.02 to 5950 Earth masses.", "view_requested": {"name": "mass_radius_complete", "sql": "SELECT * FROM dataset WHERE pl_rade IS NOT NULL AND pl_bmasse IS NOT NULL"}}
